title: OverWidthError: Testbench C set input 'm_axi_awid' to value that overflows what the signal's width can fit

features.name: narrow_signal_assignment_from_wider_c_type
features.description: Code should include explicit width matching when assigning from C++ integer types to narrower SystemVerilog signals in testbench DPI calls. C++ uint8_t is 8 bits but the target signal may be only 4 bits, causing OverWidthError.

features.name: testbench_c_to_sv_signal_width_contract
features.description: Code should include width validation when setting SystemVerilog DUT inputs from C testbench. The C type width must equal or be masked to fit the SV signal width to avoid OverWidthError.
features.snippet: Top->m_axi_awid = awid & 0xF; // mask to fit signal width
